fieldValues.value: RFC-004 Change H: Add JSON Schema projection package
Add `com.semanticops.spec/spec-authoring-json-schema` as a target projection package with exact mapping rules for rendering schema definitions and members into JSON Schema.
JSON Schema is the first exact projection, but it does not own the semantic source.

sourceRefs.note: Structured RFC-004 process record derived from the RFC-004 proposal content.
